name: Pecan Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg, oil, and milk; blend well.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
4. Stir in the chopped pecans.
5. Spoon the batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about two-thirds full.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
